meaning: adj.残忍的,畜生般的n.残忍的人,畜生
examples: "Badger," said the Rat, "_I_feel like a brute; I wonder what YOU feel like?"
He was a great brawny brute of a man.
You've forgotten my birthday again, you brute!
The criminal, by his own choice, has rejected rights in favor of brute violence.
What it lacked in functionality it could make up for in scale and brute force.
